101.value: Advisor to prepare and come back with the financial plan, including insurance, emergency reserve, retirement, car purchase, education goal, cash flows, and portfolio analysis, in about 3-4 days.
101.source: Advisor: "Let me do this analysis and give me about three to four days and then we can catch up once again. I will present to you the financial plan along with your mutual fund portfolios and other stuff."

102.value: Advisor to generate and review the client's consolidated account statement / CAS for mutual fund holdings and transactions.
102.source: Advisor: "I will generate a consolidated account statement for you..." and "I've sent a consolidated account statement"

103.value: Client to check and let the advisor know the employer group insurance details, including group life cover, personal accident cover, and critical illness cover.
103.source: Advisor: "Yeah, sure. You check and let us know of this. Just check out for options like do you have any personal accident cover or critical illness cover as well."

104.value: Client to upload the consolidated account statement received in email to her Google Drive folder.
104.source: Advisor: "You can drop in the same share drive... You can upload it there." Client: "Okay, I'll upload it."

105.value: Client to check the likely rental amount / yield for the Howrah property and revert.
105.source: Advisor: "But just take a look at it. Might not be 15k." Client: "I should be able to. Give me some time."
